evals.prompt: Convert test video to WebM with VP9+Opus
evals.expected_output: A valid WebM file with VP9 video and Opus audio codecs

evals.prompt: Resize test video to 720p maintaining aspect ratio
evals.expected_output: A video file resized to ~1280x720 (or fit within that with aspect ratio preserved)

evals.prompt: Get video info as JSON using get_video_info
evals.expected_output: A JSON file containing duration, width, height, fps, codec etc.
